welcome: Welcome to our Multi-Store Passport Promotion!
intro: Visit our partner stores, collect stamps, and unlock rewards at every step!
step1: Visit any partner store and enjoy a service
step2: Enter the store's confirmation code to collect a stamp
step3: Unlock rewards as you collect more stamps!
welcome_desc: Welcome gift from your first store
bronze_desc: 2 stamps — discount coupons for other stores
silver_desc: 3 stamps — premium offers for remaining store
gold_desc: 4 stamps — enter the Grand Prize draw!
checkin_duplicate: You have already checked in at this store.
checkin_expired: The campaign has ended or not started yet.
invalid_code: Invalid staff code. Please ask the staff.
missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
error_occurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
gold_entered: You're in the Grand Prize draw!
prize_details_sent: Prize details have been sent to your email.
confirm_use: Use this reward? It cannot be undone.
